Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Allan H. Lerch, Esq. for and with Petitioner(s): Jon F. Doyle, as guardian ad litem for Grace Doyle, a minor Claimant, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's fees: $13,561.85
Medical expenses total $14,443.14
A net balance of $1,995.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Circle Bank, Corte Madera, CA. until Minor's reaches the age of 18 years.
Status hearing is set for 03-22-12 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for status on the settlement check by Kaiser and for counsel to sumbit an Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account.
Order approving Minor's Compromise signed in open court.
